SELECT datepart(['year', 'month'], event_time) AS ym FROM timestamps WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '1990-01-01';
SELECT datepart(['day'], event_time) AS day, datepart(['month'], event_time) AS month FROM timestamps WHERE datepart(['year'], event_time) = 1992;
SELECT t1.event_time, dt.year, dt.month FROM timestamps t1 JOIN (SELECT datepart(['year', 'month'], event_time) AS (year, month) FROM timestamps) dt ON t1.event_time = dt.year;
CREATE TABLE events (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:40'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2020-05-03 14:20:00');
SELECT e.id, e.event_time, datepart(['year'], e.event_time) AS event_year FROM events e WHERE datepart(['month'], e.event_time) = 5;
WITH date_parts AS (SELECT event_time, datepart(['year', 'month', 'day'], event_time) AS part FROM timestamps) SELECT part.year, part.month FROM date_parts WHERE part.day = 20;
SELECT MAX(datepart(['year'], event_time)) AS max_year FROM timestamps WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2000-01-01';

SELECT e.id, datepart(['year', 'month', 'day'], e.event_time) AS event_parts FROM events e JOIN timestamps t ON e.event_time = t.event_time WHERE datepart(['month'], e.event_time) = datepart(['month'], t.event_time);
